misc: Has planted his seeds in four different women in four different decades.
biography: Mikko, representing Lakeside Golf Vammala, has been a steadfast presence at the Hector Trophée, marking an impressive eleven participations in this distinctive pair competition. His consistent returns underscore a remarkable commitment to the event's unique challenges and camaraderie, solidifying his status as a familiar and enduring figure within the tournament's history.

Across more than a decade of competition, Mikko has demonstrated unwavering dedication on the fairways. While the coveted Hector Trophée team title and the prestigious individual Victor Trophy have, thus far, remained just beyond his grasp, his pursuit of these accolades has been characterized by persistent effort and a resolute spirit in every outing.

Beyond the greens, Mikko's life narrative reveals a unique personal journey, notable for a distinctive familial history that spans four separate decades —a testament to a life lived with varied experiences. Although Mikko retains an active status within the Hector events, he will not be joining the field for the Hector Trophée 2026. His enduring connection to the tournament, nonetheless, ensures that his potential return in future editions will be keenly anticipated, as he continues to be a part of its unfolding story.
